signal.raw_content:
Q1 2026 Pharmaceutical Starting Material Pricing Survey — SM-A Class Intermediates

Pharma Purchasing Intelligence Q1 2026 Pricing Survey

This quarterly survey covers pricing and availability for pharmaceutical starting materials across 47 reference compounds. This edition covers Q1 2026 (January–March).

SM-A CLASS INTERMEDIATES (Protected Amine Intermediates, Aromatic)

Price benchmark: $818-825/kg for reference compound (within $820 midpoint ±0.6%). Pricing is stable quarter-over-quarter.

Supply status: Normal allocation. WuXi STA and peer suppliers reporting standard lead times of 16-20 weeks for new orders (unchanged from Q4 2025). No force majeure or allocation notices received by survey respondents as of the survey close date of March 25, 2026.

Note: Fieldwork for this survey was conducted March 1-25, 2026. Events occurring after March 25 are not reflected. [Editor's note: Post-survey, WuXi STA issued force majeure notices in early April 2026. Readers should treat SM-A availability data in this edition as superseded — see our April bulletin for updated status.]

HATU COUPLING REAGENT
Price benchmark: $680/kg for pharmaceutical-grade HATU. No Q1 price change recorded by survey respondents.

Pd/C CATALYST (5% on carbon)
Price benchmark: $1,375-1,385/kg for pharmaceutical-grade 5% Pd/C. Stable, consistent with precious metals pricing.

OVERALL ASSESSMENT: Q1 2026 showed a stable pricing environment for the reference compounds in this survey. No exceptional supply risks identified at the survey close date.
